author: IGN YouTube
text:
Scary Movie 1-5 Recap
The Scary Movie franchise is a wood-chipper of comedy into which many a horror movie has been tossed and now, its back for its sixth entry with Anna Faris, Regina Hall, Shawn, and Marlon Wayans all returning to their roles to parody movies like Longlegs, Sinners, and Halloween (2018). The new Scary Movie looks like it's going to be answering longstanding questions like what ever happened to Officer Doofy or Hanson the caretaker, so we've recapped all five of the Scary Movies. Now, when you see it, you can be sure that no one on this good, green planet will be more equipped with the knowledge or context necessary to understand the inner workings of the continuity that Scary Movie has labored over for 26 years.

#IGN #Movies

Indiana Jones and the Great Circle - 15 Minutes of Nintendo Switch 2 Gameplay
Check out gameplay from the Switch 2 port of Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. This port runs at 1080p docked thanks to DLSS upscaling and 720p while handheld at 30fps. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is available on the NIntendo Switch 2 right now!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Fable Blinks, Gets Out of GTA's Way - IGN Daily Fix
In today's Daily Fix:
XBOX's rebooted Fable has suffered another delay, this time to February 2027. The reason given is the already packed second half of the year for games, but let's be real: Fable was scheduled to launch in the Fall, around the same window as Grand Theft Auto 6. The delay will give Fable some breathing room several months after Rockstar's behemoth drops. In related news, XBOX CEO Asha Sharma warned of more difficult choices ahead, but pointed to the lowering of the Game Pass price as a positive step. And finally, 007: First Light has become IO Interactive's fastest-selling game, moving a million and a half copies in its first day.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower: Don't Miss These 10 Early Game Trinkets!
There are tons of trinkets to collect in Mina the Hollower. You'll be finding them throughout your entire journey, but there are 10 in particular that you'll want to grab as soon as possible. Some of them are for sale, some of them are side quest rewards, but in all cases, they shouldn't be missed. Follow along with this guide to find them all.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Official Azula Developer Overview
Don't miss the Azula Developer Overview for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game (working title), an upcoming 2D anime action fighting game based on the hit Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra series, developed by Gameplay Group International in collaboration with Paramount. 
Players can check out the developer-led rundown on Azula's gameplay mechanics to best utilize both of the princess's stances, air dashes, and flaming traps. Turn up the heat of any battle with Azula in Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, launching on July 2 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with an eventual release on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2.

Preorder on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/

Wishlist on PS5: 
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/

Wishlist on Xbox Series X|S: 
https://www.xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie - Exclusive Easter Eggs Clip (2026)
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is now available exclusively on digital platforms to watch with no ads or subscription required, and will be released on 4K Ultra HD, and Blu-ray June 16th, 2026 from Universal Pictures Home Entertainment. With over an hour of never-before-seen bonus content, fans can power-up their movie night experience with a guided deep dive into the Easter eggs hidden throughout the film, exclusive behind-the-scenes interviews with the all-star cast and more.

Brimming with cleverly hidden Easter eggs, the film invites fans to return again and again to catch them all. In this feature, the filmmakers and cast offer insider guidance on where to look, what to watch for, and the surprises waiting to be discovered.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Ribbon Hero - Official Teaser Trailer (English Subtitles)
Inspired by Osamu Tezuka's classic "Princess Knight," THE RIBBON HERO follows Sapphire as she overcomes loss and trauma to protect those she holds dear. This new anime film arrives August 8, 2026, only on Netflix.
